title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: gcc-toolset-15 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for gcc-toolset-15 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: This is the main package for gcc-toolset-15 Software Collection.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Add gcc-toolset-15 to RHEL8 (JIRA:RHEL-81744)  gcc-toolset-15 man pages issues [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-96025)  gcc-toolset-15 man pages issues, round two [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-98731)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for gcc-toolset-15 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

This is the main package for gcc-toolset-15 Software Collection.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Add gcc-toolset-15 to RHEL8 (JIRA:RHEL-81744)  gcc-toolset-15 man pages issues [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-96025)  gcc-toolset-15 man pages issues, round two [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-98731)
